title: 36 x Boxes Ultra Soft Luxurious 100 White Facial Family TISSUES 100 FIL 2PLY Tissue for Dental Medical Home Cleaning from PASHA81 LTD
features: Soft, White, 2-Ply 100 Facial Tissues Per Box
Ideal For School, Care Home, Dentist, Medical, Nurseries, Home etc..
description: Product Description Our Facial Tissues Made to Do More Softness You Can Feel, Quality You Can Trust Keep personal hygiene a top priority all year round with the Pasha81 Facial Tissues ! Giving you all season hygiene all around then year, our bulk pack offers unbeatable value for your money! Excellently made in UK, our facial tissue features a 2-ply construction that offers the right combination of softness and strength. Each soft yet durable sheet quickly absorbs moisture without disintegrating. It's gentle on skin yet tough on mess! Unlike facial tissues with lotion, our tissues are dry so you can use them for cleaning up messes and spilled liquid. Dab it at light spills or use it in place of dinner napkins when you've run out of the real thing! Easy-to-Use Anytime, Anywhere Packed in a compact box with a top opening for hassle-free dispensing, our soft tissues are easy to grab when you're on the go! Designed with stunning prints and patterns, the beautiful boxes will complement any part of your home—bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, dining room, and more! With this bulk pack, you won't have trouble keeping a box around your home, office, or car! Thoughtfully designed to prioritise convenience, our face tissues come in full size 210 x 200 mm so you can use them for all your needs. Bring a pack with you during a trip or travel, so you're always ready for sneezy days! Must-Have Essential for Every Season Whether it's the cold season or not, there are plenty of reasons to stock up on our soft facial tissues! Our box of tissues comes in handy when you need to immediately blow your stuffy nose or wipe your runny nose! With its soft construction that feels comfortable and gentle, it's safe even for delicate skin. Be ready for the changing seasons! Keep a box of the Pasha81 Facial Tissues no matter the weather.
